description: Phase 38: Advanced AI - AGI-Level Features. Enhance packages/ai with multimodal understanding (vision/audio/video), autonomous agents with planning and tool use, long-term memory system with knowledge graphs, and AI model marketplace for fine-tuning and hosting.
steps: Create packages/ai/src/advanced/multimodal.ts - MultimodalAI class: analyzeImage, describeVideo, transcribeAudio, generateImage, generateVideo, generateSpeech, imageToText, textToImage, videoUnderstanding
Create packages/ai/src/advanced/autonomous-agent.ts - AutonomousAgent class: planTask, executePlan, useTools, browseWeb, executeCode, reflectOnResult, adjustPlan, reportProgress, getCapabilities

Create packages/ai/src/advanced/memory-system.ts - MemorySystem class: storeMemory, retrieveMemory, searchMemories, buildKnowledgeGraph, getRelatedConcepts, updatePersonalization, forgetMemory, getMemoryStats

Create packages/ai/src/advanced/model-marketplace.ts - ModelMarketplace class: listModels, uploadModel, downloadModel, fineTuneModel, deployModel, getModelMetrics, rateModel, createEndpoint, deleteEndpoint
Create packages/ai/src/advanced/types.ts - Type definitions for MultimodalInput, AgentPlan, AgentTool, Memory, KnowledgeNode, KnowledgeEdge, ModelListing, FineTuneConfig, Deployment
Update packages/ai/src/index.ts to export all advanced modules
Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/multimodal.test.ts - Tests for image analysis, video understanding, generation
Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/autonomous-agent.test.ts - Tests for task planning, tool use, web browsing, code execution
Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/memory-system.test.ts - Tests for memory store/retrieve, knowledge graph building, personalization
acceptance_criteria: MultimodalAI handles vision, audio, and video understanding and generation
AutonomousAgent can plan tasks, use tools, browse web, and execute code
MemorySystem provides long-term memory with knowledge graph queries
ModelMarketplace enables listing, fine-tuning, and deploying custom models
All classes have comprehensive TypeScript types
Unit tests pass for multimodal, agent, and memory systems
Barrel export updated to include all advanced AI modules
pnpm typecheck passes for the ai package
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run packages/ai/src/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
